description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build and test that runs on every push to master and dev branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow has two jobs: one for building and testing on a matrix of ubuntu-latest with different C and C++ compilers, and another for building on windows-latest. The ubuntu-latest job installs dependencies, configures CMake, builds, and tests the program, while the windows-latest job installs dependencies and builds hiredis.
